home.heroDescription: Discover, learn, and connect with the worldwide artificial intelligence community. Explore cutting-edge tools, read insightful articles, and join the conversation.

about.title: About Synapse
about.description: We are building the largest open community for artificial intelligence enthusiasts, researchers, and practitioners worldwide.
about.missionText: To democratize access to AI knowledge and tools, making artificial intelligence accessible and understandable for everyone, regardless of their background or location.
about.communityText: Synapse brings together AI enthusiasts from around the world. We believe in the power of shared knowledge and collaborative learning.
about.openSourceText: We are committed to transparency and openness. Our platform is built on open standards and promotes free access to information.
